headline: The Mildly Biased Briefing
text: Right then: Colombia (Chris) beat Uzbekistan (Nana) 3-1, so that owner gets to be unbearable for at least one group chat message. Ghana (Sara) turned over Panama (Emily) 1-0; a tidy little points delivery with no signature required. England (Alex) saw off Croatia (Henry) 4-2, leaving the losing owner checking the rules for emotional compensation. Overall, Grandad is 1 point clear at the top with 7 points; Nana and Chris Haynes are nearest in the rear-view mirror on 6 points. Down in the bargain bin, Sofia is on 1 point, bravely proving that patience is a strategy. Current points gossip: 7 points: Grandad; 6 points: Nana, Chris Haynes; 5 points: Emily, Vicki, Alex, Max, Henry, Sara; 4 points: Chris; 3 points: Caroline, Jack, Rosaria; 1 point: Sofia.
